finding_results.notes: Reworked the repeated stress beat pattern into varied render modes: behavioral interruption (page snag/smoothing), procedural action (stack re-squaring), sensory displacement (water rings/key restraint), decision latency in dialogue timing, and interactional emphasis through page-straightening before refusal. At least two beats are now externalized through observable behavior and scene interaction.

summary: Addressed the sole prose finding by replacing parallel somatic-emotion stress constructions at the cited hotspots with differentiated beat design while preserving voice, pressure, continuity, and the unredacted-release/Ida-cutoff causal outcome.
